body: note_count() calls event_entries() which reads and parses the full JSONL file, then counts entries with kind=='note'. This is called per-issue during render_normal() and again during print_issues() JSON mode (which also calls load_issue separately). For a listing of N issues, each event file may be read 2-3 times. Consider caching parsed event entries on the Tracker instance during a single command invocation, or computing note_count more cheaply.
title: note_count() re-parses entire event file on every call
